name: @intentsolutionsio/ai-commit-gen
description: AI-powered commit message generator - analyzes your git diff and creates conventional commit messages instantly

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install ai-commit-gen\\n  or /plugin install ai-commit-gen@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
